title: TFMG: Fix engine controller
description: Adds gearshift and clutch functions for the TFMG engine controller, and setting item
body:
You may have noticed that the Engine Controller in [TFMG](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-tfmg) (The Factory Must Grow) does not implement a clutch and gear shifting. This mod files that by adding proper clutch and gearbox functionality. It also adds a configuration item that allows you to change the gear ratio of any gear. To shift gears, you need to hold down the clutch.



[Demostration](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jca-FNJS_zg)

### Common user issues:


- **The shaft doesn’t rotate from the engine by default** — you are in neutral gear. Shift into the next gear (check your control settings).

- **Gears won’t shift** — you need to press the clutch to change gears.

- **Rotation speed doesn’t change between gears** — you may have identical gear ratios. Try adjusting them using the controller configuration tool.

- **Gear ratio settings are not applied** — the engine must be switched off to change them.
